name: Chart.js

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need lightweight mixed series, hover hit-testing, tooltips/legends, and responsive container-aware charts instead of hand-written canvas, which fails at interaction hit-testing and reliable redraws. Do not use it for a static single bar, line, or pie chart; native SVG is enough.
en.why_valuable: AI can normally draw only one-off static bar, line, and pie charts. It cannot reliably handle element hit-testing, coordinate scales across mixed series, or responsive canvas redraws. Chart.js fills that layer with a shallow config.

data_in.note: data_in.config is passed directly to new Chart(canvas, config). The schema below only constrains common Cartesian and pie-chart paths rather than introducing another chart DSL.

data.labels?: string[] -- defaults to []; may be omitted for scatter/bubble

datasets.label?: string -- defaults to an empty string
datasets.type?: same chart-type string as config.type -- inherits config.type by default
datasets.backgroundColor?: string | string[] -- assigned by the registered Colors plugin by default
datasets.borderColor?: string | string[] -- assigned by the registered Colors plugin by default

options?._default: {}; boot also injects responsive:true and maintainAspectRatio:false
options?.plugins?: native Chart.js plugins configuration object -- uses upstream defaults
options?.scales?: native Chart.js scales configuration object -- inferred from chart type by default

spec.note: The canvas parent must have an explicit pixel height. boot defaults to 400px and disables maintainAspectRatio; iron rule 3 forbids vh and percentage heights.

when_to_use: 需要轻量的混合系列、hover 命中、tooltip/legend 与容器自适应图表时用它而非手写 canvas,因为原生手写在交互命中和可靠重绘上失败;静态单一柱线饼非做它,原生 SVG 足够。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能画一次性的静态柱线饼,做不到稳定的元素命中、混合系列尺度协调和响应式 canvas 重绘;Chart.js 用浅 config 补齐这层。

data_in.note: data_in.config 直接传给 new Chart(canvas, config);下面只钉死常用笛卡尔/饼图路径,不另造图表 DSL。

datasets.type?: 与 config.type 相同的图型字符串 —— 默认继承 config.type
datasets.backgroundColor?: string | string[] —— 默认由已注册 Colors 插件分配
datasets.borderColor?: string | string[] —— 默认由已注册 Colors 插件分配

options?._default: {};boot 另注入 responsive:true 与 maintainAspectRatio:false
options?.plugins?: Chart.js 原生 plugins 配置对象 —— 默认使用上游默认值
options?.scales?: Chart.js 原生 scales 配置对象 —— 默认按图型推断

spec.note: canvas 的父容器必须有显式像素高度;boot 默认 400px并关闭 maintainAspectRatio,铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。

example._why: 图表 config 虽浅但仍有 type/data/options 三层,附最小原生配置避免把 labels 与 datasets 对错层。

carriers.widget: supported:canvas、legend 与 tooltip 均封闭在 shadow 容器内,不需要 document.head 样式

isolation.evidence: +esm exports include `cn as Chart` and `zc as registerables` (named) — boot import {Chart, registerables} correct; new Chart(canvas,{...config,options}) with type/data/options is the canonical v4 API. grep of chart.js@4.5.1 +esm for document.head/document.body/createElement('style')/adoptedStyleSheets returned ZERO hits — canvas-only, tooltip/legend drawn on canvas, responsive via ResizeObserver on container; all shadow-safe.
